_comment: Validated primary-source channels ported from china-future-book/research/source-registry (2026-06-06). Each entry was live-tested for static feed-ability (requests-scrapeable HTML listing or JSON API). JS-rendered / captcha / blocked channels from the registry (gov-cn zuixin, gongbao, mohrss, nhc, most, peoples-daily, sasac, bis-org, stanford-hai, carnegie, macropolo, pkulaw) were EXCLUDED because they need a headless browser, not requests. 'chapter' = which book chapter the channel feeds. 'mode': scrape | scrape_kw | api_fedreg.

_needs_browser._comment: Registry channels that are JS-rendered, captcha-walled, or whose listing markup yields nav/footer junk under static requests. They need a headless browser (Kimi WebBridge) — NOT portable to the requests-based collector. Kept here so the exclusion is explicit, not silent.
_needs_browser.samr: Own /xw/ list mixes a JS national-news band; static scrape returns gov.cn 要闻 (Xi diplomacy), not SAMR regulatory items.
_needs_browser.spc: court.gov.cn zixun/news pages JS-rendered; static scrape returns footer/sister-site links.
_needs_browser.bis-us: bis.gov press-releases list JS-rendered; static scrape returns 'Skip to main content' nav.
_needs_browser.gov-cn: zhengce/zuixin is a JS template ('+listArrP[i].TITLE+'); no static items.
_needs_browser.peoples-daily: Homepage JS-rendered; static scrape returns nav.
_needs_browser.bis-org: BIS Basel press list JS-rendered; 0 static titles.
_needs_browser.carnegie: research page JS-rendered; static scrape returns nav labels.
_needs_browser.pkulaw: Tencent EdgeOne captcha; logged-in Chrome only.
_needs_browser.courtlistener: v4 REST needs an API token for docket search; root returns metadata only.
